PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ EMILIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $203.44 FILED BY SIMONS DEPARTMENT STORE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ JUAN GOMEZ SILVIA GOMEZ EMILIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMONS DEPARTMENT STORE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ SILVIA GOMEZ EMILIO $203.44 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $254.44, SILVIA & EMILIO GOMEZ ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR $72.91 OF THE JUDGMENT+COSTS. SYLVIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
